name: json-to-gcf-converter
title: JSON to GCF Converter
description: Convert JSON data into GCF (Graph Compact Format) instantly. 53-71% fewer tokens than JSON, 90.7% LLM comprehension accuracy.
author: blackwell-systems

commands.name: convert-json
commands.title: Convert JSON to GCF
commands.subtitle: GCF Format
commands.description: Convert JSON to GCF format for LLM-optimized token usage

preferences.name: defaultAction
preferences.title: Default Action
preferences.description: Choose whether to copy the result or paste it to the active application by default.

preferences.name: inputSource
preferences.title: Input Source
preferences.description: Choose whether to try selected text first or always use clipboard.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
